'''âj-j-y''' ('''kajajay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoremediate|mycoremediate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoremediate|mycoremediate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajajay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijajay|thijajay]] || [[word:jijajay|jijajay]] || [[word:shijajay|shijajay]] || [[word:kijajay|kijajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujajay|thuthujajay]] || [[word:jujujajay|jujujajay]] || [[word:shushujajay|shushujajay]] || [[word:kukujajay|kukujajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujajay|thujajay]] || [[word:jujajay|jujajay]] || [[word:shujajay|shujajay]] || [[word:kujajay|kujajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujajay|thujajay]] || [[word:jujajay|jujajay]] || [[word:shujajay|shujajay]] || [[word:kujajay|kujajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejajay|thejajay]] || [[word:jejajay|jejajay]] || [[word:shejajay|shejajay]] || [[word:kejajay|kejajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojajay|thothojajay]] || [[word:jojojajay|jojojajay]] || [[word:shoshojajay|shoshojajay]] || [[word:kokojajay|kokojajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojajay|thojajay]] || [[word:jojajay|jojajay]] || [[word:shojajay|shojajay]] || [[word:kojajay|kojajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojajay|thojajay]] || [[word:jojajay|jojajay]] || [[word:shojajay|shojajay]] || [[word:kojajay|kojajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjajay|thĂŠjajay]] || [[word:jĂŠjajay|jĂŠjajay]] || [[word:shĂŠjajay|shĂŠjajay]] || [[word:kĂŠjajay|kĂŠjajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajajay|thathajajay]] || [[word:jajajajay|jajajajay]] || [[word:shashajajay|shashajajay]] || [[word:kakajajay|kakajajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajajay|thajajay]] || [[word:jajajay|jajajay]] || [[word:shajajay|shajajay]] || [[word:kajajay|kajajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajajay|thajajay]] || [[word:jajajay|jajajay]] || [[word:shajajay|shajajay]] || [[word:kajajay|kajajay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajajay|shajajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajajay|goshajajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajajay|gokishajajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajajaynĂŒ|shajajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajajaynknĂŒ|goshajajaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajaynĂŒ|gokishajajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajajayshĂ«|shajajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajajaynkshĂ«|goshajajaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajajayshĂ«|gokishajajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajayro|shajajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajaynkro|goshajajaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajayro|gokishajajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajaymu|shajajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajaynkmu|goshajajaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajaymu|gokishajajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajajaysher|shajajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajajaynksher|goshajajaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajajaysher|gokishajajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajajayng|shajajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajajaynkng|goshajajaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajajayng|gokishajajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajajaya|shajajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajajaynkya|goshajajaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajajaya|gokishajajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajajayam|shajajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajajaynkyam|goshajajaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajajayam|gokishajajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajaynĂŒshĂ«|shajajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshajajaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishajajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajaynĂŒro|shajajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajaynknĂŒro|goshajajaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajaynĂŒro|gokishajajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajaynĂŒmu|shajajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajaynknĂŒmu|goshajajaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajaynĂŒmu|gokishajajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajayshĂ«nĂŒ|shajajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajayshĂ«ro|shajajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajaynkshĂ«ro|goshajajaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajayshĂ«ro|gokishajajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajayshĂ«mu|shajajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajaynkshĂ«mu|goshajajaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajayshĂ«mu|gokishajajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajayronĂŒ|shajajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajaynkronĂŒ|goshajajaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajayronĂŒ|gokishajajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajayroshĂ«|shajajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajaynkroshĂ«|goshajajaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajayroshĂ«|gokishajajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajajayromu|shajajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajajaynkromu|goshajajaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajajayromu|gokishajajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajajaymunĂŒ|shajajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajajaynkmunĂŒ|goshajajaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajajaymunĂŒ|gokishajajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajajaymushĂ«|shajajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajajaynkmushĂ«|goshajajaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajajaymushĂ«|gokishajajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajajaymuro|shajajaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajajaynkmuro|goshajajaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajajaymuro|gokishajajaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
